ogTitle: Murrays Run vs Murrengenburg: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Murrays Run and Murrengenburg.
heading: Murrays Run vs Murrengenburg — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Murrays Run, New South Wales and Murrengenburg, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Murrengenburg has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Murrays Run (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Murrays Run or Murrengenburg safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Murrays Run has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Murrengenburg scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Murrays Run scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Murrengenburg scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Murrays Run or Murrengenburg?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Murrengenburg has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
